title: Borrowing
content:
FROM THE FRENCH

    Some of your hurts you have cured,
    And the sharpest you still have survived,
    But what torments of grief you endured
    From evils which never arrived!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ralph Waldo Emerson delivers a powerful performance in "Borrowing"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
